summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 new features: Session Length Picker (LetterSelect), End Session Early (Study), Practice Struggling Letters (Home). All features verified via Playwright. 1 bug found and fixed (NaN% on end-early with 0 answers). All 17 test assertions passed.

ui_bugs.issue: Grammar: '1 letter need attention' should read '1 letter needs attention' (plural verb used for singular count)

action_items: Fix grammar: '1 letter need attention' → '1 letter needs attention' in Home.jsx (line: `{strugglingLetters.length} letter{...} need attention` — 'need' should become 'need{count !== 1 ? '' : 's'}')
critical_code_review_comments: ResultsScreen.jsx: Division by zero bug when sessionResults.length=0 (end-early before answering) — FIXED: now shows 0% instead of NaN%
Home.jsx struggling button: pluralization of verb 'need' not handled — '1 letter need attention' should be '1 letter needs attention'
seed_data_creation: Set 5 wrong answers for letter 'ka' via POST /api/progress/update to trigger 'struggling' mastery for practice-struggling-btn test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully tested and working. Session length picker: hidden when no letters, disabled pills when estimatedCards < value, auto-resets when letters drop below cap, All is default. End-session-btn on Study page works. Practice-struggling-btn on Home only shows when struggling letters exist, navigates directly to /study. NaN% bug in ResultsScreen.jsx was fixed by T1 (division by zero guard). Minor grammar issue remains: '1 letter need attention' in Home.jsx.

session_length_picker: session-length picker hidden when no letters selected
All 4 pills (session-length-10, -20, -30, -all) visible when letters selected
pill-10/20/30 disabled when estimatedCards < their value (3 letters = 6 cards, all disabled)
Start btn shows 'X letters · Y cards' correctly
Clicking pill-20 activates it and updates start btn to '20 cards'
Auto-reset: pill-All re-activates when deselecting letters drops estimatedCards below cap
pill-30 enabled with all 60 letters, shows '30 cards' in start btn
study_session_with_20_cards: Study header shows '1 / 20' when starting with sessionLength=20
end-session-btn present below swipe hint bar
end_early_results: Results screen shows '0%' (not NaN%) when ended before answering any card — BUG FIXED
Study Again, Change Selection, Home buttons all present
Study Again with sessionLength=null restarts session showing '1 / 10'
practice_struggling_btn: practice-struggling-btn NOT visible when no struggling letters (initial state)
practice-struggling-btn VISIBLE after 5 wrong answers for 'ka'
Study page shows '1 / 2' (only 1 struggling letter, 2 cards in non-SR mode)
regression: Stats page loads with all 4 tabs (overview, letters, time, streak)
Home page mode cards present (Gurmukhi→Sound, Sound→Gurmukhi)
No JavaScript errors on home page

nan_bug.root_cause: Line 15: `const pct = Math.round((correctCount / sessionResults.length) * 100)` — when sessionResults.length === 0, produces NaN. This happens when 'End session early' is clicked before answering any card.
nan_bug.fix_applied: Added guard: `const pct = sessionResults.length === 0 ? 0 : Math.round((correctCount / sessionResults.length) * 100)`
nan_bug.encouragement_fix: Also guarded encouragement string to return 'Keep practising!' when sessionResults.length === 0
